channel.title: Posts on 1nstinx's Blog!
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on 1nstinx's Blog!

item.title: Dont Die
item.description:
Living Forever In a Sterile Env

As experience of reality becomes more and more digitalized, one can feel a greater and greater amount of the spectrum of human emotion removed from the ailments and dangers of the “real” world.

The concept of skin in the game and why we like watching sports.

The heros of our past had to face perils in the “real world” where injury and death are inflicted upon the protagonist in their intense totality.

item.title: Limits and Acc
item.description:
The Limits to Growth: A Systems View of Civilization

In 1972, at the commissioning of The Club of Rome -TO BE SOMEHOW EXPLAINED WHO THEY ARE-, MIT’s Systems Dynamics Group plotted out a report, which came to be known as ‘The Limits to Growth’. This report is a model of the long-term interactions between the following factors:

  1. Global Population;
  2. Industrial Output;
  3. Food Production;
  4. Nonrenewable Resources;
  5. Pollution;

All of these factors were then plugged into the ‘World3’ computer model -TO BE SOMEHOW EXPLAINED WHAT IT IS-, which simulated dozens of scenarios.

item.title: My First Post
item.description:
Hello, blog

-to be added to about me- My name is Johnny and I work as a QA Engineer with 10 years of experience.

Starting at EA as a wee tester, over my tenure there I’ve

-to be added to about me-
